solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public String baseNeg2(int n) {
        if (n == 0) return "0";
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        while (n != 0) {
            int remainder = n % -2;
            n = n / -2;
            if (remainder < 0) {
                remainder += 2;
                n++;
            }
            sb.append(remainder);
        }
        return sb.reverse().toString();
    }
}
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(log n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The algorithm iteratively divides the number by -2, adjusting for negative remainders. It builds the result in reverse and then reverses it at the end. This approach is efficient and avoids unnecessary computations.
